LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC, DOUGLAS INGHAM AND DANIEL GIESKE'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Motion By The Petitioners For Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC, DOUGLAS INGHAM, DANIEL GIESKE'S Motion By The Petitioners For Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioners Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC, Douglas Ingham and Daniel Gieske's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for petitioners is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the petition was not opposed and a proposed judgment which recites the results of the arbitration award.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Off Calendar
